_comment: Firebase Hosting for 'The City' (PRD §13). Godot 4 HTML5 REQUIRES cross-origin isolation (SharedArrayBuffer), so COOP/COEP headers are mandatory — plain GCS static hosting can't set them, which is why Firebase Hosting on the same project (warroom-498513) is the recommendation. Deploy the Godot web export into ./dist. Run: firebase deploy --only hosting
